title: hemizonia multiglandulosa var. cephalotes
intro: Hemizonia multiglandulosa var. cephalotes, also known as a variety of the False Gumplant, is a flowering plant species native to California in the United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can help soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of Hemizonia multiglandulosa var. cephalotes include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
